northStarMetric.name: Reduce Quote-to-Activation Time
northStarMetric.measurement: Order.ActivatedDate minus Quote.SignedDate per order — Salesforce Report

approvalGateVocabulary.approved: Human accepted — stage complete, next stage may begin
approvalGateVocabulary.skipped: Human bypassed gate — stage marked skipped, next stage may begin
approvalGateVocabulary.rejected: Human sent back with revise notes — stage re-opens
approvalGateVocabulary.awaiting: Gate presented, waiting for human response

kpi.name: Pricing Calculation Accuracy
kpi.target: 99.5% automated accuracy within 30 days of deploy

userStories.title: As a Pricing Manager, I want tiered rate lookup tables so prices auto-calculate by quantity band
userStories.kpi: Decision table lookup returns correct tier price for all quantity bands

userStories.title: As a Solution Architect, I want a Pricing Lineage Report so every price element is traceable to an sObject field
userStories.kpi: 100% of pricing fields traceable via Pricing Lineage Report

userStories.title: As a Developer, I want Expression Set variables with input/output flags so writeback to Quote is explicit
userStories.kpi: Expression Set writeback accuracy >= 99.5%

userStories.title: As a Developer, I want Context Tag mappings wired to Quote fields so pricing context resolves correctly at runtime
userStories.kpi: Context tag resolution rate >= 99% at runtime

userStories.title: As a QA Engineer, I want decision table permutation tests covering all tier boundaries including edge quantities
userStories.kpi: All tier boundary permutations pass automated test

userStories.title: As a QA Engineer, I want UI vs API context divergence test cases to catch channel-specific runtime differences
userStories.kpi: Zero UI/API pricing divergence in regression suite

userStories.title: As a Release Engineer, I want a SFDMU seeding script so tiered pricing data deploys repeatably to any sandbox
userStories.kpi: Seeding script executes in < 60s on any sandbox

dependencies.title: Standard Pricebook must exist in target org
dependencies.desc: FTR-001 pricing procedures cannot activate until the Standard Pricebook record is seeded. This is a data dependency, not metadata.

dependencies.title: Context Tag schema approved by SA
dependencies.desc: Expression Set variables cannot be declared until the Solution Architect signs off the Context Tag schema from the Design gate.

userStories.title: As a Sales Rep, I want swap eligibility auto-detected so I am never shown ineligible replacement products
userStories.kpi: Zero ineligible products shown during swap

userStories.title: As a Sales Rep, I want margin delta displayed during swap so I can make an informed decision before confirming
userStories.kpi: Margin delta display latency < 500ms

userStories.title: As a QA Engineer, I want regression coverage on swap logic so upstream pricing is not regressed by the new flow
userStories.kpi: 100% regression pass rate on swap flow

userStories.title: As a Release Engineer, I want a deployment runbook with rollback steps so swap data can be cleanly reversed in production
userStories.kpi: Rollback completes in < 15 mins from runbook

userStories.title: As a Product Owner, I want fibre speed tiers defined in the catalogue so reps configure them without code changes
As a Product Owner, I want install fee rules captured so billing calculates the correct one-time charge at order activation

dependencies.title: Regulatory approval for broadband pricing tiers
dependencies.desc: Tier pricing structure requires legal sign-off before being coded into Expression Sets. This is blocking design start.

dependencies.title: Fibre product SKUs loaded into org
dependencies.desc: FTR-003 discovery cannot complete until core fibre product SKUs are loaded into the org by the data team.

features.name: 5G Smart Office — Product Catalog & Bundle Structure

kpi.name: Quote-to-Activation Time
kpi.target: Reduce to 3 days within 60 days of deploy

userStories.title: As a Catalog Admin, I want the 5G Smart Office bundle hierarchy defined so products are structured 3 levels deep in RCA
userStories.kpi: Bundle hierarchy activates without validation errors in org

userStories.title: As a Pricing Manager, I want a Consumption Schedule on the Data Plan so tiered overage charges apply when bandwidth limits are breached
userStories.kpi: Overage pricing calculates correctly for all 3 consumption tiers

userStories.title: As a Sales Rep, I want fiber install price auto-calculated from Fiber_Meters__c so I never need to manually compute the site fee
userStories.kpi: Install price = $500 + ($250 x FLOOR(meters/100)) with zero manual overrides needed

userStories.title: As a Pricing Manager, I want the Telco Platinum SLA priced at exactly 15% of Router + Data Plan net price so SLA revenue is always accurate
userStories.kpi: SLA PoT calculation variance = 0% vs manual calculation in 100% of test cases

userStories.title: As a Sales Rep, I want a validation rule blocking SLA selection without a Router so invalid bundles cannot be quoted
userStories.kpi: 100% of SLA-without-Router quote attempts blocked at save

features.name: 5G Smart Office — Pricing Rules & Advanced Approvals

kpi.name: Quote-to-Activation Time
kpi.target: Approval cycle completes within 4 business hours for >20% discount quotes
kpi.measurement: Approval.CreatedDate to Approval.LastModifiedDate — Salesforce Approval History Report

userStories.title: As a Pricing Manager, I want a volume discount price rule so customers buying 25+ routers automatically receive 15% off the Data Plan
userStories.kpi: Volume discount applies to 100% of qualifying multi-site quotes with zero manual intervention

userStories.title: As a Finance Director, I want sequential approval routing for discounts over 20% so financial risk is reviewed by Finance then NetOps before quote is sent
userStories.kpi: 100% of >20% discount quotes locked and routed correctly to Finance Director then NetOps VP

userStories.title: As a Finance Director, I want an automatic 4-hour escalation so unanswered approvals are forwarded to my manager without manual chasing
userStories.kpi: Approval escalation fires within 4 business hours for 100% of unanswered approval steps

dependencies.title: FTR-004 bundle products must exist before price rules can reference them
dependencies.desc: Volume discount Price Rule targets the Data Plan product — product record must be seeded in org before FTR-005 build can start.
dependencies.blockedByName: 5G Smart Office — Product Catalog & Bundle Structure

features.name: 5G Smart Office — Order Decomposition (3 Fulfillment Tracks)

kpi.name: Quote-to-Activation Time
kpi.target: 3 days — all 3 tracks complete within 72 hours of Order activation

userStories.title: As a Warehouse Ops Manager, I want hardware fulfillment events published to the ERP on Order activation so routers are picked and shipped on Day 1
userStories.kpi: ERP_Confirmed__c stamped within 2 hours of Order activation for 99% of orders

userStories.title: As a Network Engineer, I want async network activation triggered on IMEI scan so provisioning completes without blocking the Order transaction
userStories.kpi: Network activation confirmed within 24 hours of IMEI scan for 99% of sites

userStories.title: As a Field Service Dispatcher, I want a Work Order auto-created on Order activation with SLA window so technicians are dispatched within 4 hours
userStories.kpi: Work Order assigned within 4 hours for 95% of activations; fiber splice complete by Day 2

dependencies.title: ADR-002 committed before Track 2 build starts
dependencies.desc: Async Queueable Apex pattern for Telco Network Controller API must be architecturally approved before any code is written for Track 2.

dependencies.title: ADR-003 committed before Track 1 build starts
dependencies.desc: Platform Event schema for Hardware_Fulfillment__e must be approved and deployed before Track 1 Flow can reference it.

dependencies.title: FTR-004 Order products must exist before decomposition flows can route by ProductCode
dependencies.desc: Track 1 and Track 2 flows filter OrderItems by ProductCode — product records must be seeded before FTR-006 build starts.
dependencies.blockedByName: 5G Smart Office — Product Catalog & Bundle Structure
